memberdef.name: cJSON_ArrayForEach
memberdef.initializer: for(element = (array != NULL) ? (array)->child : NULL; element != NULL; element = element->next)

memberdef.definition: char const int const cJSON_bool format
memberdef.name: format

memberdef.definition: const cJSON* const const cJSON_bool case_sensitive
memberdef.name: case_sensitive

memberdef.definition: const char* const const cJSON_bool boolean
memberdef.name: boolean

memberdef.definition: const char* const const char* const raw
memberdef.name: raw
